title: Spicy Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry with a spicy kick. Serve over rice or noodles for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Mixed Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite stir-fry vegetables, such as bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the breaded chicken breasts and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned and crispy.
Pour in the spicy stir fry sauce and stir to coat.
Add the crispy fried noodles and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Serve hot over rice or noodles and enjoy!
